meaning: 美国有线新闻网络,以提供即时电视新闻报导而闻名
examples: He flunked out, a school official told CNN.
Unsuccessful at screen writing, he got a spot on a CNN show.
Based out of the network's New York bureau, Lemon joined CNN in September 2006.
Former Bush aide and CNN political commentator Ana Navarro spoke highly of the move.
